metadata.title:
FIREMAN AND TEMPLAR WENT


TO JAIL FOR FREE SPEECH

pages.raw_text:
as appears this contest by the au-
thorities of Spokane to prevent
speaking on the street. 1t Is not
opposition to street speaking that
is impelling them on, but hostility
to labor. The officials of Spokane
have permitted themselves to be
used as catspaws by interests hos
tile to the workingmen, and the eff.
fort is now to crush the l. w. w.
in this fight in the hope of deliv'
ering another blow to labor. There
is no use denying the issue.


81 spent nearly week in Jail,
going there voluntarily because
was disguised with the way this
situation is handled by the authori'
ties. | repeatedly asked for trial
and they finally turned me loose.


Asked If his lodge connections
were responsible for his release,
Robinson said that he did not
know but thought that the police
had come to the conclusion that
they could not convict him.
